facilities.name: South Gate Transfer Station
facilities.hours: Open Monday-Saturday from 6:00 AM to 5:00 PM. No hand-unloaded vehicles after 4:30 PM and unloading must be complete by 4:50 PM.
facilities.fees: Disposal fees vary by material type, load size, and vehicle class. The district accepts cash, credit card, debit card, or pre-arranged credit; no checks.
facilities.rules: Secure your load, bring only non-hazardous material, and review current rate information before driving.

facilities.name: Puente Hills Material Recovery Facility & Transfer Station
facilities.address: 13130 Crossroads Parkway South, City of Industry, CA 91746
facilities.hours: Open Monday-Saturday from 4:00 AM to 5:00 PM. No hand-unloaded vehicles after 4:30 PM and unloading must be complete by 4:50 PM.
facilities.fees: Transfer fees vary by load type, weight, and vehicle class. The district accepts cash, credit card, debit card, or pre-arranged credit; no checks.
facilities.rules: A safety vest is required whenever you exit your vehicle. Secure your load and confirm current material restrictions before arrival.

facilities.name: Scholl Canyon Landfill
facilities.hours: Self-haul hours are Monday-Friday from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM and Saturday from 8:00 AM to 3:30 PM. Closed Sunday.
facilities.fees: Landfill fees vary by load size, weight, and material type. Check the official landfill page for current rates before you drive.
facilities.rules: Covered loads and landfill safety rules apply. Confirm accepted materials and payment methods before arrival.

facilities.name: Calabasas Landfill
facilities.hours: Current operating hours are Monday-Friday from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM and Saturday from 8:00 AM to 2:30 PM. Closed Sunday.
facilities.fees: Landfill fees vary by load type, weight, and material class. Review the current Calabasas rate schedule before driving.
accepted_materials: Solid waste from the Calabasas wasteshed
not_accepted: Solid waste from outside the Calabasas wasteshed
facilities.rules: The landfill limits solid-waste disposal to the Calabasas wasteshed. Confirm current wasteshed rules and accepted materials before arrival.

facilities.name: Sunshine Canyon Landfill
facilities.hours: Regular hours are Monday-Friday from 6:00 AM to 6:00 PM and Saturday from 7:00 AM to 12:00 PM. Hand-unload loads must be on the scales by 5:00 PM weekdays and 11:00 AM on Saturday.
facilities.fees: Public self-haul pricing varies by material. The landfill applies a one-ton minimum for many disposal categories, so confirm current rates before you drive.
facilities.rules: An origin report form is required for every transaction. If you exit your vehicle, safety glasses, a hard hat, and a reflective vest are required.

facilities.name: Glendale Recycling Center
facilities.address: 540 W. Chevy Chase Drive, Glendale, CA 91204
facilities.hours: Open Monday-Friday from 7:30 AM to 4:45 PM and Saturday from 8:00 AM to 3:30 PM.
facilities.fees: CRV payouts are available for eligible containers. Other accepted household recyclables are generally drop-off items; confirm any item-specific fees before arrival.
accepted_materials: Used motor oil and oil filters
not_accepted: Hazardous waste outside posted program scope
facilities.rules: Use the city recycling center page to confirm current accepted items and any holiday closures before driving.

facilities.name: Burbank Recycle Center
facilities.hours: Drop-off recycling and CRV hours are Monday-Friday from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM and Saturday from 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM. Electronic drop-off is not accepted on weekends or city holidays.
facilities.fees: CRV redemption is available for qualifying beverage containers. Confirm any special program rules before arrival.
facilities.rules: This is a resident-focused city program. Confirm current accepted materials and any proof-of-residency requirements before driving.

facilities.name: Burbank Recycle Center Drop Zone
facilities.hours: The drop zone is open Monday-Friday from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM and closed Saturday, Sunday, and city holidays. The office closes from 12:00 PM to 1:00 PM for lunch.
facilities.fees: The city lists this as a resident and qualifying small-business drop zone. Confirm current eligibility and any item limits before arrival.
facilities.rules: Review the city's universal and HHW guidance before you drive because the drop zone accepts a narrower set of materials than a full HHW facility.

facilities.name: Washington Blvd. S.A.F.E. Center
facilities.address: 2649 E. Washington Boulevard, Los Angeles, CA 90021
facilities.hours: Open Saturday and Sunday from 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM.
facilities.fees: Household hazardous waste and e-waste drop-off is generally free for Los Angeles City and County residents with household quantities. Confirm current eligibility before arrival.
facilities.rules: Bring household quantities only, stay in your vehicle, and use the city S.A.F.E. page to confirm current limits or temporary closures before visiting.

facilities.name: Nicole Bernson S.A.F.E. Center
facilities.hours: Open Saturday and Sunday from 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM.
facilities.fees: Household hazardous waste and e-waste drop-off is generally free for Los Angeles City and County residents with household quantities. Confirm current eligibility before arrival.
facilities.rules: Bring household quantities only, stay in your vehicle, and use the city S.A.F.E. page to confirm current limits or temporary closures before visiting.

facilities.name: Gaffey Street S.A.F.E. Center
facilities.address: 1400 N. Gaffey Street, San Pedro, CA 90731
facilities.hours: Open Saturday and Sunday from 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM.
facilities.fees: Household hazardous waste and e-waste drop-off is generally free for Los Angeles City and County residents with household quantities. Confirm current eligibility before arrival.
facilities.rules: Bring household quantities only, stay in your vehicle, and use the city S.A.F.E. page to confirm current limits or temporary closures before visiting.

facilities.name: Randall Street S.A.F.E. Center
facilities.hours: Open Saturday and Sunday from 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM.
facilities.fees: Household hazardous waste and e-waste drop-off is generally free for Los Angeles City and County residents with household quantities. Confirm current eligibility before arrival.
facilities.rules: Bring household quantities only, stay in your vehicle, and use the city S.A.F.E. page to confirm current limits or temporary closures before visiting.

facilities.name: Hyperion S.A.F.E. Center
facilities.address: 7660 W. Imperial Highway, Gate B, Playa Del Rey, CA 90293
facilities.hours: Open Saturday and Sunday from 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM.
facilities.fees: Household hazardous waste and e-waste drop-off is generally free for Los Angeles City and County residents with household quantities. Confirm current eligibility before arrival.
facilities.rules: Bring household quantities only, stay in your vehicle, and use the city S.A.F.E. page to confirm current limits or temporary closures before visiting.

facilities.name: UCLA West S.A.F.E. Center
facilities.address: 550 Charles E. Young Drive West, Los Angeles, CA 90095
facilities.hours: Open Saturday from 8:00 AM to 2:00 PM for e-waste only.
facilities.fees: This city program is generally free for Los Angeles City and County residents bringing household electronic waste. Confirm current eligibility before arrival.
accepted_materials: Other covered e-waste accepted by the city program
facilities.rules: This S.A.F.E. location is for e-waste only. Stay in your vehicle and confirm current eligibility or closures on the city S.A.F.E. page before visiting.

facilities.name: Antelope Valley Environmental Collection Center
facilities.address: 1200 W. City Ranch Road, Palmdale, CA 93551
facilities.hours: Open on the first and third Saturday of each month from 9:00 AM to 3:00 PM.
facilities.fees: This county program is generally free for residents with household hazardous waste and e-waste. Confirm current item limits and eligibility before driving.
facilities.rules: Use the county HHW page to confirm accepted items, packaging instructions, and any weather-related schedule changes before visiting.

facilities.name: EDCO Environmental Collection Center
facilities.hours: Open on the second and fourth Saturday of each month from 9:00 AM to 2:00 PM.
facilities.fees: This county program is generally free for residents with household hazardous waste and e-waste. Confirm current item limits and eligibility before driving.
facilities.rules: Use the county HHW page to confirm accepted items, packaging instructions, and any weather-related schedule changes before visiting.
